title: Argument Game
genericDescription: Make a claim through mechanics; support interpretation with evidence; allow players to test the claim.
specificDescription: Storytelling and Digital Humanities students build a playable humanities argument. Metamodern Interactive Art students build a game that oscillates between sincerity and critique. Gaming for the AI Age students build a game that argues about AI capability, labor, risk, or creativity. Include an author's statement.
gradingRubric: 30 pts strength of playable argument; 20 pts track sophistication; 20 pts player agency; 15 pts supporting statement; 15 pts playtest response.
